channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Honouring Nurses’ Lifelong Dedication During Nursing Week 2026
item.description: Nursing Week 2026, taking place from May 11 to May 17, celebrates the essential role of nurses in supporting patients through all stages of life. This year’s theme, 'A Lifetime of Care,' recognises th...

item.title: Alphonso Davies Sidelined by Hamstring Injury Ahead of World Cup
item.description: Canadian left back Alphonso Davies, a key player for both Bayern Munich and the national team, has sustained a left hamstring injury with just over a month before Canada co-hosts the 2026 World Cup. B...

item.title: Premier League Relegation Battle Intensifies for Tottenham, West Ham and Nottingham Forest
item.description: The Premier League relegation race has entered a critical stage as Tottenham, West Ham and Nottingham Forest fight to secure their top-flight status. Tottenham, under Roberto De Zerbi, have raised the...

item.title: One Nation’s David Farley engaged with local independent ‘Voices’ group before Farrer byelection
item.description: David Farley, the One Nation candidate for Farrer, reportedly engaged with the community-driven independent movement 'Voices of Farrer' ahead of the 2024 election. Documents obtained by Guardian Austr...

item.title: Upcoming Series A Funding Challenges for Startups in 2027: Insights from TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, scheduled for October 13-15 at Moscone West in San Francisco, will feature a key session on the evolving landscape of Series A funding for 2027. The session highlights how the...

item.title: Potential Lahar Risks Rise as Mayon Volcano Gully Fills with Debris
item.description: Residents near Mayon Volcano face increased risks after the Misi-Is Gully, a natural channel for lava and pyroclastic flows, became filled with volcanic debris. Local authorities, including Daraga Alb...

item.title: Meralco Bolts Defeat Terrafirma Dyip to Earn Quarterfinal Bonus in PBA
item.description: In the latest PBA Commissioner's Cup action, the Meralco Bolts delivered an impressive performance against the Terrafirma Dyip, dominating throughout the game and securing a crucial quarterfinal bonus...

item.title: EU rules airlines cannot retroactively charge fuel surcharges after ticket purchase
item.description: The European Union has issued new guidance prohibiting airlines from charging additional fuel surcharges after customers have purchased their tickets. This decision comes amid the ongoing energy crisi...

item.title: Football club owners charged with sexual offences and human trafficking appear in court
item.description: The owners of Maldon & Tiptree Football Club, Barrie Drewitt-Barlow, 57, and his husband Scott, 32, have appeared at Chelmsford Magistrates' Court facing multiple serious charges including rape, sexua...

item.title: SA Rugby extends domestic broadcast partnership with Canal+ and SuperSport
item.description: SA Rugby has renewed its multi-year domestic broadcast rights deal with Canal+, ensuring that SuperSport remains the official broadcaster for all domestic rugby competitions as well as Springbok women...

item.title: Muiz Banire Calls for Nationwide Adoption of Lagos Security Trust Fund Model with Stronger Transparency
item.description: Former Lagos State Commissioner for Environment and ex-AMCON Chairman, Muiz Banire (SAN), don talk say make Nigeria states adopt the Lagos State Security Trust Fund model to better fund security acros...

item.title: Former President Goodluck Jonathan Files Preliminary Objection Against Suit Seeking to Bar Him from 2027 Election
item.description: Former President Goodluck Jonathan on Friday entered appearance in a Federal High Court suit in Abuja wey one lawyer, Johnmary Jideobi, file to stop am from contesting the 2027 presidential election. ...

item.title: TRA United end Azam FC’s unbeaten run as Yanga remain sole unbeaten side
item.description: TRA United shocked fans at the Sheikh Amri Abeid Stadium on Friday, May 8, 2026, by defeating Azam FC 4-1, ending their unbeaten streak in the Mainland Premier League. Azam FC started strong, taking a...

item.title: Wales Senedd Election 2026: Labour Projects Heavy Losses and Opposition Role as Counting Continues
item.description: In the 2026 Senedd election, the first conducted under the new closed proportional list system, Labour has conceded significant defeats and is projected to secure only around 10 to 12 seats, marking i...

item.title: Santam partners with SA Weather Service to install new weather stations and boost early warnings
item.description: Santam and the South African Weather Service (SAWS) have announced a partnership to strengthen the country’s early warning systems against severe weather events. The collaboration includes the install...

item.title: Québec solidaire convenes in Montreal to discuss policies ahead of election
item.description: Québec solidaire, the leftist sovereigntist party in Quebec, is holding its annual convention this weekend in Montreal, with just five months remaining before the provincial election on October 5. The...

item.title: ANC contends with challenges ahead of local government elections
item.description: The African National Congress (ANC) is gearing up for upcoming local government elections amid internal factional disputes and reputational damage linked to corruption allegations. Analysts note that ...

item.title: AAP MP Raj Kumar Chabbewal receives suspicious birthday call claiming to be Amit Shah
item.description: On his birthday, Raj Kumar Chabbewal, the AAP Lok Sabha MP from Hoshiarpur, received a peculiar call from an unknown number. The caller first claimed that Union Home Minister Amit Shah wanted to speak...

item.title: Bauchi Senator Abdul Ningi Officially Leaves PDP After Long Service
item.description: Senator Abdul Ahmed Ningi wey dey represent Bauchi Central don resign from the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) after over 28 years for inside politics. Ningi give letter to PDP chairman for Ningi Ward,...

item.title: Hudson Young set to return for Raiders' clash against Panthers as Canberra Stadium anticipates big crowd
item.description: Hudson Young is set to return to the Canberra Raiders for their upcoming NRL clash against the Penrith Panthers on Sunday, after serving a two-game suspension. His absence coincided with a number of i...
